title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Hyderabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions:
DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DXC Technology India Ventures Solutions!
